backstory.original: Despite a reputation as a loud, gruff, and stinky dwarf who hates bathing, Thibbledorf Pwent is a loyal and beloved member of Clan Battlehammer. Known as 'Pwent' to his friends, he leads the Gutbusters of Mithral Hall, a dwarven battlerager squad focused on direct combat with little regard for their own safety. He wears armor completely covered in spikes to help rend the flesh of his enemies, and in the midst of battle Pwent often falls into a bloodrage, doing anything to protect his allies. While not an official member of the Companions of the Hall, Pwent will always aid his King when possible -- even beyond death...
backstory.display: 虽然作为一个吵闹、粗暴又讨厌洗澡的臭矮人而闻名，第伯多夫·普旺特仍是战锤氏族忠诚而受人爱戴的成员。他被朋友们称为“普旺特”，领导着秘银厅的“破腹旅”。这是一支专注于直接战斗的矮人战斗队伍，几乎从不考虑自身安全。他穿着全身覆盖尖刺的盔甲，以撕裂敌人的肉体。在战斗中，普旺特经常陷入血泊之中，他会不惜一切代价保护他的盟友。虽然不是秘银五侠的正式成员，但普旺特总是在可能的情况下帮助他的王，甚至超越死亡......

description.original: Pwent lowers his head and rushes to a random enemy, using his armor as a weapon to cut & injure the enemy.
description.display: 普旺特低头冲向一名随机敌人，使用护甲作为武器来切割和伤害敌人。

description.original: Pwent dashes quickly around the area rounding up all available enemies, and then stuns, damages, and inflicts a bleed effect on them.
description.display: 普旺特在区域内快速冲刺将所有剩余敌人围住，然后对他们造成眩晕、伤害和流血效果。

longDescription.original: Pwent dashes quickly around the area rounding up all available enemies, and then stuns, damages, and inflicts a bleed effect on them.
longDescription.display: 普旺特在区域内快速冲刺将所有剩余敌人围住，然后对他们造成眩晕、伤害和流血效果。

description.original: Pwent is not the cleanest dwarf. He slows the attacks of those around him, but increases the amount of damage those slowed Champions do.
description.display: 普旺特算不上是最正派的矮人。他会降低周围勇士的攻击速度，但提升他们造成的伤害量。

conditions.desc: When $source attacks he causes all enemies he damages to Bleed, taking $(amount) seconds worth of BUD damage every second for the next $(total_seconds) seconds. While an enemy is bleeding, attacks that target them have a $(pwent_bleed_crit_amount)% higher chance to critical hit (additively). If $source attacks an enemy that is already bleeding the duration is reset.

When $source attacks he causes all enemies he damages to Bleed, taking $(amount) seconds worth of BUD damage every second for the next $(total_seconds) seconds. While an enemy is bleeding, attacks that target them have a $(amount___2)% higher chance to critical hit (additively). If $source attacks an enemy that is already bleeding the duration is reset.
$source攻击时导致所有受其伤害的敌人流血，在接下来的 $(total_seconds) 秒内每秒受到 $(amount) 秒的基础杀招伤害。当敌人流血时，以他们为目标的攻击有 $(pwent_bleed_crit_amount)% 的几率暴击（加算）。如果$source攻击正在流血的敌人，则持续时间重置。
$source攻击时导致所有受其伤害的敌人流血，在接下来的 $(total_seconds) 秒内每秒受到 $(amount) 秒的基础杀招伤害。当敌人流血时，以他们为目标的攻击有 $(amount___2)% 的几率暴击（加算）。如果$source攻击正在流血的敌人，则持续时间重置。

tipText.original: Enemies attacked by Pwent have a higher chance to being crit by any Champions
tipText.display: 被普旺特攻击的敌人，受到任意勇士暴击的几率提高

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions not adjacent to $source by $(amount)%.
不与$source相邻的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。

tipText.original: Pwent increases the damage of Champions NOT adjacent to him.
tipText.display: 普旺特使不与其同列的勇士提升伤害。

description.desc: When $source attacks, if he attacks an enemy that has already been affected by his Bleed effect, there is a $(amount)% chance that his attack cooldown will instantly reset.
当$source攻击时，如果他攻击的敌人已经受到流血效果的影响，则他的攻击冷却时间有 $(amount)% 的几率立即重置。

conditions.desc: When a Champion not adjacent to $source scores a critical hit, $source increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)%. This can multiplicatively stack up to $(max_stacks) times, with the stacks being reset on area change.

When a Champion adjacent to $source scores a critical hit, $source increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)%. This can multiplicatively stack up to $(max_stacks) times, with the stacks being reset on area change.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Each time $target deals a Critical Hit, they contribute a Gutbuster stack to $(source_hero)

conditions.desc: 当不与$source相邻的勇士造成暴击时，$source使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。此效果最多以乘算堆叠 $(max_stacks) 层，并在改变区域时重置。
当与$source相邻的勇士造成暴击时，$source使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。此效果最多以乘算堆叠 $(max_stacks) 层，并在改变区域时重置。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 每当$target造成暴击时，都会为$(source_hero)贡献一层“捣腹”堆叠

description.desc: $(upgrade_name id) now triggers when non-adjacent Champions score critical hits, instead of adjacent Champions.
$(upgrade_name id)现在当非相邻勇士造成暴击时触发，而不是相邻勇士。

specializationDescription.original: Pwent recruits Champions a little farther away
specializationDescription.display: 普旺特招募勇士的距离稍远

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Dwarf Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and including himself.
阵型中的每位矮人勇士均使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，并且包括他自己。

specializationDescription.display: 普旺特以他的矮人气味为荣

description.desc: Attacks targeting enemies that $source has caused to Bleed have a $(total_bonus_crit_chance)% additive chance to be a critical hit, up from $(base_crit_chance)%.
向处于$source导致的流血状态下的敌人发动的攻击提高 $(total_bonus_crit_chance)% 的暴击几率，从 $(base_crit_chance)% 起以加算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Pwent increases his damage against injured enemies
specializationDescription.display: 普旺特对受伤敌人的伤害提高

description.desc: While not a member of the Companions of the Hall, $source fully supports them in their quests. Your formation gains one Mithral Hall stack. $source increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)% for each Mithral Hall stack you have, stacking multiplicatively.
虽然不是秘银五侠成员，但$source全力支持他们的使命。你的阵型获得一层秘银厅堆叠。每层秘银厅堆叠均使$source的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 普旺特秘银厅堆叠层数

description.display: 我来解决这些乌合之众。

description.original: Wait for me to get outa the way before ye throw tha fireball!
Complain all you want -- it's helping!
description.display: 随便你们怎么抱怨--这很有帮助！

description.original: I didn't bathe for three weeks before the battle! That's what helped us win!
description.display: 战斗前我有三个星期没有洗澡了！这就是帮助我们获胜的原因！

description.original: Ye should smell it. It smells like BATTLE!
description.display: 你应该能闻到，闻起来就有战斗的味道！

description.original: Now you know what it means to be a Gutbuster!
description.display: 现在你知道破腹旅的本事了吧！
你觉得对方看明白了吗？
破腹旅！你们准备好了吗？！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Despite a reputation as a loud, gruff, and stinky dwarf who hates bathing, Thibbledorf Pwent is a loyal and beloved member of Clan Battlehammer. Known as 'Pwent' to his friends, he leads the Gutbusters of Mithral Hall, a dwarven battlerager squad focused on direct combat with little regard for their own safety. He wears armor completely covered in spikes to help rend the flesh of his enemies, and in the midst of battle Pwent often falls into a bloodrage, doing anything to protect his allies. While not an official member of the Companions of the Hall, Pwent will always aid his King when possible -- even beyond death...
character_sheet_details.system_description: Pwent increases the formation's damage as they kill enemies he has bled. His smell also slows the attack speed of adjacent Champion, but also greatly increases their damage.

event_upgrades.name: Can You SMELL That?
event_upgrades.description: Pwent is not the cleanest dwarf. He slows the attacks of those around him, but increases the amount of damage those slowed Champions do.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 虽然作为一个吵闹、粗暴又讨厌洗澡的臭矮人而闻名，第伯多夫·普旺特仍是战锤氏族忠诚而受人爱戴的成员。他被朋友们称为“普旺特”，领导着秘银厅的“破腹旅”。这是一支专注于直接战斗的矮人战斗队伍，几乎从不考虑自身安全。他穿着全身覆盖尖刺的盔甲，以撕裂敌人的肉体。在战斗中，普旺特经常陷入血泊之中，他会不惜一切代价保护他的盟友。虽然不是秘银五侠的正式成员，但普旺特总是在可能的情况下帮助他的王，甚至超越死亡......
character_sheet_details.system_description: 普旺特在杀死被他放血的敌人时会增加阵型伤害。他的气味会减慢相邻勇士的攻击速度，但会大大提高他们的伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 闻到了吗？
event_upgrades.description: 普旺特算不上是最正派的矮人。他会降低周围勇士的攻击速度，但提升他们造成的伤害量。
